column8: - Have you made plans for the summer? - Yes,___________to Spain.
column9: - We're moving house tomorrow- Really? ___________you with the furniture.
column10: -  Do you need this paintbrush?- Ah, yes____________it to me, please?
column11: - What do you want to be when you grow up, Stevie? - ___________a scientist. That's what I want to do, anyway.
column12: - John is a better player than Martin, isn't he? - Oh, yes________the match tomorrow, I expect.
column13: - The weather has been terrible, hasn't it? - Yes, I think____________again later.
